Puducherry Weather Today (Tuesday, Mar 03, 2026)
The minimum temperature in Puducherry today is likely to hover around 22 degrees Celsius, while the maximum temperature might reach 30 degrees Celsius. The mercury level is expected to hover around 30 degrees Celsius throughout the day, with the wind speed around 5.03. The wind will move around 111 degrees with a gust speed of 5.93. The sunrise time is 06:25 AM, while it will set at 06:20 PM on Tuesday. As per the seven-day weather prediction, the temperature in Puducherry is likely to reach 30 degrees Celsius on Tuesday, 30 degrees Celsius on Wednesday, 31 degrees Celsius on Thursday, 32 degrees Celsius on Friday, 31 degrees Celsius on Saturday, 30 degrees Celsius on Sunday and 30 degrees Celsius on Monday.
